## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and upcoming opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance shows significant improvement: 450% increase in clicks, 3X increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Content refreshes yielding 650% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [New opportunity to target Splash customers due to Cvent acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Immediate CRO improvements recommended: exit intent pop-ups, table of contents, sidebar widgets](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [30 articles published, generating 60 clicks and 6,700 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Week 2 performance: 51 clicks (450% increase) and 5,000 impressions (3X increase)](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [20 new articles contributing to 13% of overall blog clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Content refreshes: 650% increase in impressions (from 40 to 250 daily)](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Overall blog impressions increased from 4,000 to 5,500-6,000 (50% growth)](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Content Strategy and Ranking Improvements

  - [Internal linking strategy boosting rankings (e.g., "event management software" moved up 31 positions)](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Focus on creating topical authority around key terms](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Aiming for first page rankings for target keywords in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Recommendation to implement table of contents for improved readability](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Recommendations

  - [Implement exit intent pop-ups (70-80% scroll depth)](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Offer high-value lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Add sidebar widgets](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Enhance chatbot functionality for email capture](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Consider moving knowledge base content to blog format after performance evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Competitor Acquisition Opportunity

  - [Cvent acquiring Splash creates opportunity to target Splash customers](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Focus on field marketing teams (Splash's strength)](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Develop content around field marketing best practices, event tech, and platforms](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Create competitor pages targeting "Google Splash" and "Google Cvent" keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

### Additional Marketing Strategies

  - [Explore affiliate opportunities through backlink analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Launch outbound competitor conquest campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Develop dedicated field marketing product landing page](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

  - [Swoogo to send list of target keywords for field marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Implement CRO improvements (exit intent, table of contents, sidebar widgets)](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance and ranking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Develop content strategy targeting Splash customers and field marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Explore affiliate and outbound marketing opportunities for competitor conquest](https://fathom.video/share/zjH7Fqrs1_Gzn-F5EvhYnb5xY3GxgGVp?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
